subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book hath indeed spoken at the Point of Return before the faces of the servants: "By God, the Lord of Creation hath come! The sovereignty is God's, the Lord!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق ام الکتاب فی الماب امام وجوه العباد تا الله اتی مالک الایجاد الملک لله رب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
